title: JMAP_BASE_URL defaults to hardcoded port 7734 ignoring LISTEN_ADDR
description: JMAP_BASE_URL env var defaults to http://127.0.0.1:7734 in daemon/src/main.rs regardless of the LISTEN_ADDR setting. If an operator changes the listen port via LISTEN_ADDR, the Session object still advertises upload/download URLs at port 7734. Clients following those URLs from the Session object will connect to the wrong port. Fix: derive the default JMAP_BASE_URL from the resolved LISTEN_ADDR rather than hardcoding it.
